documents.title: Voluntary Response Action Program (VRAP) — Overview
documents.description: Maine DEP's voluntary cleanup program. Provides regulatory oversight and closure for contaminated sites not subject to enforcement action, including a No Further Action letter upon completion.

documents.title: Maine Remedial Action Guidelines (RAGs)
documents.description: Maine DEP numeric soil and groundwater remediation criteria. Organized by land use category (residential, non-residential) and exposure pathway.

documents.title: Maine Construction General Permit (CGP)
documents.description: Maine DEP general permit for construction sites disturbing 1+ acres. Requires a Stormwater Pollution Control Plan addressing erosion, sedimentation, and post-construction requirements.

documents.title: Maine MS4 General Permit
documents.description: EPA-delegated MS4 general permit for Maine municipalities. Requires Stormwater Management Programs addressing minimum control measures, annual reports, and illicit discharge elimination.

documents.title: Maine Brownfields Program — Site Assessment Resources
documents.description: Maine DEP Brownfields Program resources for Phase I and II site assessments, including AAI compliance documentation, grant information, and links to EPA Region 1 brownfields support.
